items.name: Crab Cake
items.description: Served over sweet chili slaw with chipotle aioli.
items.upsell: Pairs great with Prosecco or Sauvignon Blanc.

items.name: Traditional Wings
items.description: Dry-rubbed with spice blend. Choice of: Buffalo with blue cheese OR Maker’s Mark BBQ with ranch.
items.upsell: For Buffalo: Riesling or Prosecco. For BBQ: Zinfandel or Red Blend.

items.name: Boneless Wings
items.description: Dry-rubbed with spice blend. Choice of: Buffalo with blue cheese OR Maker’s Mark BBQ with ranch OR Nashville Hot with pickles & spicy ranch.
items.upsell: Nashville Hot loves a touch of sweetness: Riesling or Moscato.

items.name: Goetta Fries
items.description: French fries topped with goetta, cheddar, jalapeño-sour cream, green onion.
items.upsell: Prosecco cuts the richness; Chardonnay also works.

items.name: Bacon Bourbon Pimento Cheese
items.description: Served warm with crackers.
items.upsell: Chardonnay or Pinot Noir is a safe move here.

items.name: BBQ Shrimp Cornbread
items.description: Sliced cornbread, sautéed BBQ shrimp, scallions.
items.upsell: Try Rosé or Sauvignon Blanc; for bolder guests, Zinfandel.

items.name: Spinach & Artichoke Bake
items.description: Corn tortilla chips, pico de gallo.

items.name: Crab Stuffed Mushrooms
items.description: Lump crabmeat, cream cheese, provolone, parmesan, broiled to golden brown.

items.name: Margherita Flatbread
items.description: Garlic oil, three cheese blend, tomato, basil, naan bread.

items.name: Chicken Quesadilla
items.description: Blackened chicken, roasted corn salsa, cheddar, guacamole, green onion, pico, sour cream.
items.upsell: Rosé or Riesling plays well with blackened spice.

items.name: Chicken & Andouille Spring Rolls
items.description: Blackened chicken, sharp cheddar, sweet chili sauce.

items.name: Soup (Cup)
items.description: Tomato Basil, French Onion, or Soup of the Day.
items.upsell: Pair with Sauvignon Blanc or Pinot Grigio.

items.name: Soup (Bowl)
items.description: Tomato Basil, French Onion, or Soup of the Day.
items.upsell: Pair with Sauvignon Blanc or Pinot Grigio.

items.name: Chopped Salad
items.description: Iceberg, bacon, blue cheese crumbles, tomato, ranch.

items.name: Spinach Salad
items.description: Fresh spinach, red onion, tomato, bacon, hard-cooked egg, dried cranberries, house maple balsamic.

items.name: Farmhouse Salad
items.description: Mixed greens, goat cheese, blueberries, bacon, spiced pepitas, honey basil vinaigrette.

items.name: Roasted Butternut Squash Salad
items.description: Mixed greens, gorgonzola, red onion, walnuts, pear vinaigrette.

items.name: Cranberry Pecan Salad
items.description: Mixed greens, dried cranberries, blue cheese, sweet roasted pecans, orange-cranberry splash dressing.

items.name: Caesar (Small)
items.description: Romaine hearts, croutons, parmesan, caesar dressing.

items.name: Caesar (Regular)
items.description: Romaine hearts, croutons, parmesan, caesar dressing.

items.name: House Salad (Small)
items.description: Mixed greens, tomato, almonds, feta, cornbread croutons, house balsamic vinaigrette.

items.name: House Salad (Regular)
items.description: Mixed greens, tomato, almonds, feta, cornbread croutons, house balsamic vinaigrette.

items.name: deSha’s Fish & Chips (Small)
items.description: Panko-breaded Atlantic haddock, fries, coleslaw, tartar sauce.
items.upsell: Prosecco or Sauvignon Blanc (acid cuts fried).

items.name: deSha’s Fish & Chips (Regular)
items.description: Panko-breaded Atlantic haddock, fries, coleslaw, tartar sauce.
items.upsell: Prosecco or Sauvignon Blanc (acid cuts fried).

items.name: The Pub Fish & Chips
items.description: Beer-battered Atlantic haddock, fries, coleslaw, tartar sauce.

items.name: Blackened Grouper
items.description: Angel hair pasta, gorgonzola cream sauce, cherry tomatoes, spinach.
items.upsell: Rosé or Sauvignon Blanc; Chardonnay if they love creamy.

items.name: Grilled Salmon (Entrée)
items.description: Herbed rice, roasted corn salsa, basil oil.

items.name: Smoked Gouda & Chicken Pasta
items.description: Chicken, bacon, broccoli, red pepper, green onion, gouda cream sauce, parmesan, penne.

items.name: Filet Mignon
items.description: 6 oz. grilled filet, asparagus, mashed red potatoes, garlic butter.

items.name: Prime Rib (10 oz)
items.description: Mashed red potatoes, au jus, mushroom caps, creamy horseradish.

items.name: Prime Rib (14 oz)
items.description: Mashed red potatoes, au jus, mushroom caps, creamy horseradish.

items.name: Southern Style Meatloaf
items.description: Mashed red potatoes, country green beans, BBQ ketchup.

items.name: Maker’s Mac & Cheese
items.description: Maker’s Mark BBQ pulled pork over smoked gouda mac & cheese, green onion.
items.upsell: Zinfandel or Red Blend; Chardonnay if they want white.

items.name: Classic Pot Roast
items.description: Mashed red potatoes, root vegetables, bordelaise.

items.name: Kentucky Hot Brown
items.description: Toasted sourdough, turkey, cheddar, bacon, tomato, cream sauce.

items.name: Jambalaya
items.description: Jumbo shrimp, chicken, andouille sausage, creole rice.

items.name: Buttermilk Fried Chicken (Small)
items.description: Mashed red potatoes, country green beans, bacon pan gravy.

items.name: Buttermilk Fried Chicken (Regular)
items.description: Mashed red potatoes, country green beans, bacon pan gravy.

items.name: Pick 2 Combo
items.description: Choose two: Sandwich (Grilled 3Cheese on Sourdough / Chicken Salad Sandwich / Open-Faced Tuna Melt), Soup (French Onion / Tomato Basil / Soup of the Day), Garden Quiche (tomato, broccoli, spinach, cheddar), Salad (House or Caesar).
items.upsell: Ask if they want a crisp glass of Sauvignon Blanc with it.

items.name: Crab Cake Sandwich
items.description: Lemon garlic aioli, marinated tomatoes, brioche. Served with fries.

items.name: Pot Roast Melt
items.description: Swiss & American, caramelized onions, Texas toast, creamy horseradish. Served with fries.

items.name: Pulled Pork
items.description: Maker’s Mark BBQ pulled pork, coleslaw, brioche. Served with fries.

items.name: Fish on Rye
items.description: Panko-breaded haddock, lettuce, tomato, pickle, tartar sauce, marble rye. Served with fries.

items.name: Prime Rib Pretzel
items.description: Green peppers, onions, mozzarella, provolone, au jus. Served with fries.

items.name: Grilled Salmon Sandwich
items.description: Basil mayo, lettuce, tomato, pickle, brioche. Served with fries.

items.name: Turkey-Bacon Club
items.description: Cheddar, lettuce, tomato, basil mayo, focaccia. Served with fries.

items.name: Nashville Hot Chicken
items.description: Fried chicken breast, pepper jack, coleslaw, pickles, ciabatta. Served with fries.
items.upsell: Riesling or Moscato; Prosecco also works.

items.name: The Classic
items.description: Grilled chicken breast, housemade dry rub, provolone, chipotle aioli, lettuce, tomato, pickle, ciabatta. Served with fries.

items.name: Meatloaf Down South
items.description: House-made meatloaf, Coca-Cola BBQ, pimento cheese, pickles, brioche, sweet potato fries.

items.name: deSha’s Specialty Burger
items.description: Grilled onions, mushrooms, bordelaise, swiss cheese, brioche, french fries.

items.name: The All-American Burger
items.description: Lettuce, tomato, pickle, brioche, french fries.

items.name: Traditional Breakfast
items.description: Scrambled eggs, bourbon-glazed apples, bacon or sausage, breakfast potatoes, biscuit.
items.upsell: Prosecco (easy brunch win) or Pinot Grigio.

items.name: Vegetable Quiche
items.description: Served with spinach & goat cheese salad, berries, candied pecans, orange cranberry splash dressing.

items.name: Belgian Waffles
items.description: Bourbon apples, strawberries, blueberries, maple syrup, whipped cream, sausage patties.

items.name: Chicken & Waffles
items.description: Honey butter & maple syrup. Ask for Nashville Hot Chicken if spicy.

items.name: Skillets
items.description: Served over breakfast potatoes, topped with 2 fried eggs and a biscuit. Options: Fried Chicken Cheddar (cheese & sausage gravy), Goetta Pepperjack (pico, country gravy), Ham Swiss (cheese, mushrooms, sautéed onions, country gravy).
items.upsell: Chardonnay if they like rich; Sauvignon Blanc if they want crisp.

items.name: Bourbon Raisin Bread Pudding
items.description: Maple syrup, fresh fruit, sausage patties.

items.name: Breakfast Quesadilla
items.description: Ham, potato, mushroom, pepperjack, cheddar, feta, pico, sour cream, guacamole.

items.name: Goetta Quesadilla
items.description: Cheddar, scrambled egg, jalapeño sour cream, green onion.

items.name: Cincinnati Breakfast Sandwich
items.description: Goetta, ham, fried egg, cheddar, tomato, toasted sourdough with breakfast potatoes.

items.name: Blackened Shrimp Grits
items.description: Cheese grits, bacon, sautéed tomatoes, over-easy egg, biscuit.

items.name: Biscuit & Three
items.description: Choose a trio of sides with a biscuit (cheddar grits, bourbon apples, fresh fruit, biscuits, wheat toast, eggs, sausage gravy, sausage patties, applewood smoked bacon, goetta, grilled ham, breakfast potatoes).
items.upsell: Prosecco is the safe default for brunch.

items.name: Kids Belgian Waffle
items.description: With maple syrup and honey butter, choice of bacon or sausage.

items.name: Kids Breakfast
items.description: Scrambled eggs, fresh fruit, choice of bacon or sausage.

items.name: Bubbles & Berries
items.description: Prosecco, Chambord, orange juice, berries.

items.name: Kentucky Peach
items.description: Woodford Reserve Bourbon, peach purée, lemon, mint, soda.

items.name: Espresso Martini (Brunch)
items.description: Bacardi Silver Rum, Kahlúa, Frangelico, espresso blend.

items.name: Mimosas
items.description: Traditional, Mango, Peach, or Passionfruit.

items.name: Loaded Bloody Mary
items.description: House-infused pickle vodka, skewer, bacon-salt rim.

items.name: Nick’s Bloody Mary
items.description: Wheatley Vodka, Guinness Stout & 5oz Stella Artois beer back.

items.name: Bourbon & Bacon
items.description: Woodford Reserve Bourbon & bacon strip.

items.name: Happy Hour
items.description: $1.50 off Draft Beers, Wines By The Glass, & Signature Cocktails • $7.50 Well Mixed Drinks • $3 add a shot of any of ‘the olds’ to a draft beer

items.name: BBQ Tavern Crisps
items.description: Cheddar, red onion, bacon.

items.name: Blue Lightning
items.description: Blue cheese and bacon dip, served with pretzel crostinis.

items.name: Buffalo Chicken
items.description: Boneless chicken tenders tossed in buffalo sauce, blue cheese crumbles, diced celery, ranch.

items.name: Tavern Beer Cheese
items.description: Served with soft pretzels.

items.name: Meatloaf Sliders
items.description: Two sliders, BBQ ketchup, cheddar, caramelized onions, pickles.

items.name: Pulled Pork Flatbread
items.description: Maker’s Mark BBQ, onion, provolone & mozzarella, naan bread.

items.name: Brûléed Cheesecake
items.description: With caramel sauce.

items.name: Tavern Hot Apple Pie
items.description: With vanilla bean ice cream, caramel sauce, sugar dust.

items.name: deSha’s Bread Pudding
items.description: Custard-based bread pudding, whiskey sauce, raisins, vanilla bean ice cream.

items.name: Deep-Dish Chocolate Chip Cookie
items.description: Warm chocolate chunk cookie, vanilla bean ice cream, caramel, hot fudge.

items.name: Crème Brûlée
items.description: Rich vanilla custard with fresh strawberries.

items.name: Blackberry Cobbler
items.description: With vanilla bean ice cream, pomegranate sauce.

items.name: Brownie Fix
items.description: Hot fudge, vanilla bean ice cream, whipped cream, pecans.

items: deSha’s Manhattan — Woodford Reserve Bourbon, Carpano Antica Sweet Vermouth, bitters, flamed orange & cherry
Rye Old Fashioned — Bulleit Rye Whiskey, simple syrup, orange bitters
Grapefruit & Basil — Ketel One Vodka, grapefruit juice, simple syrup, basil
Raspberry Mule — house-infused raspberry vodka, lime juice, Crabbie’s Original Alcoholic Ginger Beer
The Grand Spritz — Aperol, strawberry simple, lemon juice, Grand Marnier, Zardetto Prosecco
Espresso Martini — Bacardi Silver Rum, espresso blend, Kahlúa, Frangelico
Rose Lemon Drop — Tanqueray Gin, rose syrup, lemon juice
Patrón Margarita — Patrón Silver Tequila, agave, lime juice, salt rim (+ mango/peach/strawberry/passionfruit options)
Seasonal Sangria — ask about current selection
Rye: Basil Hayden Dark, Bulleit, Knob Creek, Michter’s Single Barrel, Robert James, Woodford Reserve
North American: American Honey, Gentleman Jack, Jack Daniel’s
Canadian: Crown Royal, Crown Royal Apple, Seagram’s 7 Crown, Seagram’s VO
Irish: Bushmills, Jameson, Redbreast 12yr, Tullamore D.E.W.
Blended Scotch: Chivas 12yr, Dewar’s White Label, Johnnie Walker Black Label
Single Malt Highland: Dalwhinnie 15yr, Glenmorangie 12yr Quinta Ruban, Glenmorangie 12yr Lasanta, Oban 14yr
Single Malt Islay: Ardbeg 10yr, Lagavulin 16yr, Laphroaig 10yr
Single Malt Speyside: Balvenie 12yr DoubleWood, Glenfiddich 12yr, Glenfiddich 15yr, Glenlivet 12yr, Glenlivet 21yr Archive, Macallan 12yr
Tequila: 1800 Silver, Don Julio Añejo, Don Julio Reposado, Don Julio Silver, Patrón Añejo, Patrón Reposado, Patrón Silver, Sauza Silver
Vodka: Absolut, Absolut Citron, Belvedere, Grey Goose, Ketel One, Tito’s Handmade, Wheatley
Gin: Beefeater, Bombay, Bombay Sapphire, Hendrick’s, Tanqueray
Rum: Bacardi Silver, Bacardi Limón, Captain Morgan, Cruzan Light, Malibu, Myers’s Dark
Cognac: Courvoisier VSOP, Hennessy VS, Paul Masson VS, Rémy Martin VSOP
Strawberry Dreams — strawberry simple, cranberry juice, pear nectar, edible glitter
Mango Tango Fizz — Mango Reàl, honey simple syrup, lime juice, ginger ale, red pepper flakes
Fallen Nectar — pear nectar, honey simple syrup, lemon juice, muddled orange
Berrylicious Delight — blueberries, strawberry simple syrup, lime juice, coconut water, soda, mint garnish
Perrier Mojito — lime juice, lemon juice, simple syrup, mint leaves, Perrier sparkling water
Coffee/Tea/Juice: regular & decaf coffee, iced & hot tea, apple, cranberry, grapefruit, orange & pineapple juice
Soda: Coke, Coke Zero, Diet Coke, Sprite, Fanta Orange, Canada Dry Ginger Ale, Minute Maid Lemonade
Bottled: IBC Root Beer, Perrier Sparkling Water
